zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Stevenson於1600年1月28日之前出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，她的父親William Stevenson44歲，母親Margareta Dunn4歲。她於1616年與Stephen Lynn Whitson在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1622年6月13日在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾，埋葬在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stevenson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Steven, Stephen (see Steven ) + -son. This surname is also very common in northern Ireland (especially Antrim and Down), where it has been interchangeable with Steenson and Stinson . In North America, this surname has also absorbed various European cognates, such as Danish, Norwegian, and North German Steffensen or Stephensen ; see also Stevens .

Scottish: variant of Stevenston, a habitational name from Stevenston (Ayrshire), Stevenson in Newlands (Peeblesshire), or Stevenson in Haddington (East Lothian). The placename in each case derives from the personal name Steven + Older Scots toun ‘farmstead, settlement’.
English: habitational name from Stevenstone (Devon), meaning ‘Stephen's farmstead’.

variants.name: Stimpson
meanings: variant of Stevenson , with a progressive shortening of Steven- to Sten-, Stin-, and finally Stimp-. Compare Stenson , Stinson .
sometimes perhaps a variant of Timson with a prosthetic S-.

variants.name: Steveson
meanings: English (Derbyshire): from a shortened form of   Stevenson  .

variants.name: Stinson
meanings: English: shortened form of   Stevenson  . Compare   Steenson   and   Stimpson  .

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Scottish, English, Dutch, and North German: from the personal name Steven, from Latin Stephanus, Greek Stephanos ‘crown’. This was a popular name throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages, having been borne by the first Christian martyr, stoned to death at Jerusalem three years after the death of Christ. In North America, this surname has also absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. German Steffen , German and Polish Stefan , Slovenian and Slovak Štefan, Hungarian István (see Istvan ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see Stevens ).

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Stevenson was born before 28 January 1600, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, her father, William Stevenson, was 44 and her mother, Margareta Dunn, was 4. She married Stephen Lynn Whitson in 1616, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 13 June 1622, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, and was buried in Barnstaple, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Stevenson est née avant 28 janvier 1600, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Stevenson, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margareta Dunn, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Lynn Whitson en 1616, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juin 1622, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Stevenson(이)가 1600년 1월 28일 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stevenson(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margareta Dunn(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 1616년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 Stephen Lynn Whitson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1622년 6월 13일 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바른스타플에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Stevenson родилась перед 28 январь 1600 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Stevenson было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margareta Dunn, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Lynn Whitson в 1616 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 июня 1622 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия и была похоронена в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия.
